full_text:
Xun Yan (Xiuruo) 荀衍 (休若)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Yan (荀衍), styledXiuruo (休若), was born in Yingchuan. Brother of Xun Yu, he defeated Gao Gan’s surprise attack. Xun Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
